root_text.an8.81:1.1: “Satisampajaññe, bhikkhave, asati satisampajaññavipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti hirottappaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:1.2: Hirottappe asati hirottappavipannassa hatūpaniso hoti indriyasaṁvaro.
root_text.an8.81:1.3: Indriyasaṁvare asati indriyasaṁvaravipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti sīlaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:1.4: Sīle asati sīlavipannassa hatūpaniso hoti sammāsamādhi.
root_text.an8.81:1.5: Sammāsamādhimhi asati sammāsamādhivipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:1.6: Yathābhūtañāṇadassane asati yathābhūtañāṇadassanavipannassa hatūpaniso hoti nibbidāvirāgo.
root_text.an8.81:1.7: Nibbidāvirāge asati nibbidāvirāgavipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti vimuttiñāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:1.8: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, rukkho sākhāpalāsavipanno. Tassa papaṭikāpi na pāripūriṁ gacchati, tacopi … pheggupi … sāropi na pāripūriṁ gacchati.
root_text.an8.81:1.9: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, satisampajaññe asati satisampajaññavipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti hirottappaṁ;
root_text.an8.81:2.1: Satisampajaññe, bhikkhave, sati satisampajaññasampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti hirottappaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:2.2: Hirottappe sati hirottappasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti indriyasaṁvaro.
root_text.an8.81:2.3: Indriyasaṁvare sati indriyasaṁvarasampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti sīlaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:2.4: Sīle sati sīlasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti sammāsamādhi.
root_text.an8.81:2.5: Sammāsamādhimhi sati sammāsamādhisampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:2.6: Yathābhūtañāṇadassane sati yathābhūtañāṇadassanasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti nibbidāvirāgo.
root_text.an8.81:2.7: Nibbidāvirāge sati nibbidāvirāgasampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti vimuttiñāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an8.81:2.8: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, rukkho sākhāpalāsasampanno. Tassa papaṭikāpi pāripūriṁ gacchati, tacopi … pheggupi … sāropi pāripūriṁ gacchati.
root_text.an8.81:2.9: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, satisampajaññe sati satisampajaññasampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti hirottappaṁ;

translation_text.an8.81:1.1: “Mendicants, when there is no mindfulness and situational awareness, one who lacks mindfulness and situational awareness has destroyed a vital condition for conscience and prudence.
translation_text.an8.81:1.2: When there is no conscience and prudence, one who lacks conscience and prudence has destroyed a vital condition for sense restraint.
translation_text.an8.81:1.3: When there is no sense restraint, one who lacks sense restraint has destroyed a vital condition for ethical conduct.
translation_text.an8.81:1.4: When there is no ethical conduct, one who lacks ethics has destroyed a vital condition for right immersion.
translation_text.an8.81:1.5: When there is no right immersion, one who lacks right immersion has destroyed a vital condition for true knowledge and vision.
translation_text.an8.81:1.6: When there is no true knowledge and vision, one who lacks true knowledge and vision has destroyed a vital condition for disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an8.81:1.7: When there is no disillusionment and dispassion, one who lacks disillusionment and dispassion has destroyed a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an8.81:1.8: Suppose there was a tree that lacked branches and foliage. Its shoots, bark, softwood, and heartwood would not grow to fullness.
translation_text.an8.81:1.9: In the same way, when there is no mindfulness and situational awareness, one who lacks mindfulness and situational awareness has destroyed a vital condition for conscience and prudence.
translation_text.an8.81:1.10: When there is no conscience and prudence …
translation_text.an8.81:1.11: One who lacks disillusionment and dispassion has destroyed a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an8.81:2.1: When there is mindfulness and situational awareness, one who has fulfilled mindfulness and situational awareness has fulfilled a vital condition for conscience and prudence.
translation_text.an8.81:2.2: When there is conscience and prudence, one who has fulfilled conscience and prudence has fulfilled a vital condition for sense restraint.
translation_text.an8.81:2.3: When there is sense restraint, one who has fulfilled sense restraint has fulfilled a vital condition for ethical conduct.
translation_text.an8.81:2.4: When there is ethical conduct, one who has fulfilled ethical conduct has fulfilled a vital condition for right immersion.
translation_text.an8.81:2.5: When there is right immersion, one who has fulfilled right immersion has fulfilled a vital condition for true knowledge and vision.
translation_text.an8.81:2.6: When there is true knowledge and vision, one who has fulfilled true knowledge and vision has fulfilled a vital condition for disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an8.81:2.7: When there is disillusionment and dispassion, one who has fulfilled disillusionment and dispassion has fulfilled a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an8.81:2.8: Suppose there was a tree that was complete with branches and foliage. Its shoots, bark, softwood, and heartwood would grow to fullness.
translation_text.an8.81:2.9: In the same way, when there is mindfulness and situational awareness, one who has fulfilled mindfulness and situational awareness has fulfilled a vital condition for conscience and prudence.
translation_text.an8.81:2.10: When there is conscience and prudence …
translation_text.an8.81:2.11: One who has fulfilled disillusionment and dispassion has fulfilled a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.”
